gary_2026_07_16_the_startup_pitch_demo_s.label: Startup / Business
gary_2026_07_16_the_startup_pitch_demo_s.place: The Yard: Herald Sq, 106 W 32nd St
gary_2026_07_16_the_startup_pitch_demo_s.summary: Gary's Guide: See the newest companies coming out of the NYC startup ecosystem. Provide peer feedback & network with ambitious founders at The Startup Pitch: Demo Showcase. This pitch & demo showcase gives you a first look at new technology from startups that are actively building & shipping product - sometimes even before VCs have seen them!

gary_2026_07_16_product_summit.title: Product Summit
gary_2026_07_16_product_summit.label: Startup / Business
gary_2026_07_16_product_summit.summary: Gary's Guide: A one-day summit for product leaders & professionals at the edge of innovation. Themes being explored: Leading Product Strategy Through Disruption Frameworks for navigating market uncertainty, maintaining cross-functional alignment, & building resilient product roadmaps in rapidly evolving industries. Building Trust in AI-Driven Products Best practices for integrating intelligent systems & autonomous features while prioritizing user confidence, data privacy, & transparent user experiences. Unlocking Product-Led Growth & Retention How to build self-sustaining ecosystems by combining continuous user discovery, community engagement, & operational discipline to drive enduring product growth. "Shifting Left" in the Product Lifecycle Practical frameworks for accelerating time-to-value & reducing risk by bringing continuous discovery, technical feasibility, & quality assurance to the earliest stages of development. The Product Manager of the Future How autonomous agents, large language models, & advanced tooling are reshaping product workflows, strategic decision-making, & the PM's role in human-computer interaction. Speakers from Past Events Our stage hosts senior leaders from global brands who are driving innovation at scale. Details of the Evening Agenda 2:50pm Check-in Opens 3:15pm Sessions Begin 5:45pm Closing Remarks 6:00pm Cocktail Reception Who Should Attend The Product Summit is designed for senior product leaders & builders who are driving innovation across the entire product lifecycle. This invitation-only summit brings together those operating at the intersection of emerging technology, continuous discovery, & product-led growth. What's Included Gourmet Light Refreshments - Enjoy a curated selection of artisanal bites & small plates, perfect for connecting with colleagues. Settle in for easy conversation & good company in a warm, welcoming space. With a thoughtful selection of beer & wine on hand, it's the perfect backdrop for winding down or catching up. Have dietary restrictions? To ensure we can accommodate your dietary needs, please inform us at least 48 hours before the workshop start date.

gary_2026_07_16_nyc_ai_nexus_inaugural_d.title: NYC AI Nexus - Inaugural Demo Day
gary_2026_07_16_nyc_ai_nexus_inaugural_d.label: Tech / AI
gary_2026_07_16_nyc_ai_nexus_inaugural_d.summary: Gary's Guide: Join C10 Labs for one of our inaugural NYC AI Nexus Demo Day! C10 Labs is an Applied AI venture fund & studio supporting early-stage founders building at the intersection of AI, healthcare, biotechnology, robotics, advanced manufacturing, energy, & sustainability. The evening is designed to be high-impact & fast-paced: Rapid-Fire Pitches: 3 minute presentations from select C10 Labs cohort companies. Alumni Showcase: A look at our top portfolio companies & previous success stories. Networking Mixer: Direct access to the founders & the C10 team. We look forward to celebrating our NYC & talking about the NYC program. Our NYC cohorts are designed for idea-stage, pre-seed, seed & pre-series A teams looking to turn ambitious technical ideas into venture-backable companies through hands-on support, real-world validation, & deep operator expertise. Founders in our program receive: Applied AI curriculum & technical mentorship Access to domain experts, operators, & early customers Studio support around product, data, compute, & go-to-market A powerful NYC-based network of industry & ecosystem partners Come meet the C10 Labs team, connect with fellow builders, & learn more about what we're building in NYC.

gary_2026_07_16_winning_in_ai_search_ama.title: Winning In AI Search Amazon Edition Aperitivo
gary_2026_07_16_winning_in_ai_search_ama.label: Tech / AI
gary_2026_07_16_winning_in_ai_search_ama.summary: Gary's Guide: We're bringing together a small group of Amazon operators, marketplace leaders, & AI enthusiasts for drinks overlooking Times Square during Amazon's Seller Growth Summit. AI is rapidly changing how shoppers discover products. From Alexa's new shopping experience to generative recommendations, conversational search, & AI-assisted purchasing journeys, traditional SEO playbooks are being rewritten. Meanwhile tools like Claude & Codex are redefining workflows. How do brands win? Over drinks & aperitivo, we'll discuss: What AI Search means for Q4 2026, on Amazon & off-Amazon Alexa's growing role in product discovery How generative shopping experiences influence visibility Optimizing listings for AI-driven recommendations Measuring AI Search performance Connecting catalog quality, ads, & AI visibility Practical lessons from brands already adapting No presentations. No panels. Just thoughtful conversation with fellow operators navigating the next evolution of Amazon growth. Hosted by AutopilotBrand Autopilot helps brands increase Amazon revenue through AI-powered listing optimization, catalog automation, & AI Search Optimization. Limited Capacity Kindly apply for your spot. Attendance is limited to 10 operators.

gary_2026_07_16_bitcoin_developers_socra.title: Bitcoin Developers Socratic Meetup
gary_2026_07_16_bitcoin_developers_socra.label: Tech / AI
gary_2026_07_16_bitcoin_developers_socra.summary: Gary's Guide: Special thanks to our sponsor Cake Wallet for providing the food! We will open doors at 6pm for socializing, & plan on starting the discussion around 7pm. RSVPs required! You *MUST* put your first & last name in the RSVP questionnaire. Due to policies at our host location's building, you may be asked for photo ID at the security desk. Thanks to our friends at Chaincode Labs for refreshments & event space. If this is your first time, please read about our Socratic Seminar series here. Our topic list will be available closer to the event on bitdevs.org. Please make topic suggestions in the comments section below, or reach out to us on Twitter or nostr!

gary_2026_07_16_builders_founders_creati.title: Builders, Founders & Creatives Meetup
gary_2026_07_16_builders_founders_creati.label: Startup / Business
gary_2026_07_16_builders_founders_creati.summary: Gary's Guide: This is not a formal networking event. It's more of a relaxed meetup for people building things, exploring ideas, working on creative projects, or just looking to meet other thoughtful, ambitious people in the city. You'll likely meet people across a mix of backgrounds, including: Business owners & operators Tech founders & startup people People working in AI, software, & product Creatives, artists, designers, & musicians People building side projects Investors, freelancers, consultants, & friends of friends Curious people looking for good conversation The vibe is simple: grab a drink, meet cool people, talk about what you're working on, share stories, & enjoy a relaxed night with a good crowd. Please get at least one drink at the bar to support the venue. Everyone covers their own tab. There will also be professional photography & video captured during the event, so you may get some great photos from the evening. By attending, you consent to being photographed & filmed. Photos & videos may be used for event recaps, social media, & future promotional material. Hosted by Ishaan.

gary_2026_07_16_ai_engineers_poker_game_.title: AI Engineers - Poker & Game Night
gary_2026_07_16_ai_engineers_poker_game_.label: Tech / AI
gary_2026_07_16_ai_engineers_poker_game_.summary: Gary's Guide: Join us for a private, invite-only Poker & Game Night for founders, engineers, & VCs building the next generation of AI companies. We'll have four poker tables running throughout the night, plus board games & video games including Smash Bros & Mario Kart. Complimentary drinks & pizza are on us. High signal, low pressure. Come play poker, jump into games, & spend the night with some of NYC's top engineers, founders, & operators. Limited seats. Registration: require linkedin, company, job title, & include the following multiple choice (single select) How would you like to participate? Poker has a $100 buy-in & limited seating. For guests who select poker, seats are first come, first served at check-in. *Guests accepted into Fonzi Match Day will be guaranteed a poker seat. To join Match Day, visit Fonzi.ai click Get Hired, & apply. Options: Poker ($100 buy-in, seat not guaranteed) Hang Out & Other Games Hiring? Want intros to startups?

gary_2026_07_17_dev_cup_w_tavily_composi.title: Dev Cup w/ Tavily & Composio
gary_2026_07_17_dev_cup_w_tavily_composi.label: Tech / AI
gary_2026_07_17_dev_cup_w_tavily_composi.summary: Gary's Guide: DEV CUP: TAVILY X COMPOSIO Your agents are working. You should be playing. Come out, touch grass (literally), & share a ball with fellow devs who believe the future of work is one where your AI handles the grind so you don't have to. Tavily & Composio are helping agents handle the busy work that keeps you at your desk. So close the laptop. The agents got it! July 17th 6:30 PM UWS Court, New York City Expect: Pickup futbol on a real court World Cup energy (we'll have the scores) Good convos about agents, AI, & what it means to actually log off Fellow devs who get it Free to attend. Bring cleats or sneakers. Leave the laptop. LIMITED SPACE AVAILABLE

gary_2026_07_21_the_shortlist_july_found.title: The Shortlist - July Founder Showcase
gary_2026_07_21_the_shortlist_july_found.label: Startup / Business
gary_2026_07_21_the_shortlist_july_found.summary: Gary's Guide: The Shortlist NYC - July Founder Showcase (#6) The Shortlist is back for our monthly Founder Showcase & the room keeps getting better. This is a monthly curated, application-only evening connecting early-stage founders with exceptional operators across New York. No panels. No pitches to VCs. Just six founders building breakout companies, a room full of people who've built things themselves, & the kind of candid conversation you don't get at most events. Each founder will share what they're building, why it matters, & the specific roles they're actively hiring for right now - followed by a mixer. What to expect: Founders presenting at the seed through Series B stage. Operators, builders, & executives who've seen what good looks like. An intentionally small room designed for real connection. Who this is for: Exceptional operators - whether you're actively exploring your next role, casually curious, or simply want to stay close to what's being built in NYC right now. Founders will be announced in the days leading up to the event. Attendance is intentionally limited. Apply to be considered. More information on The Shortlist can be found here. Founded by Andrew Yeung & Ivor Straford.

In a single morning, you'll gain actionable insights, learn new perspectives, & meet peers also looking to move forward.

gary_2026_07_22_startup_founders_investo.title: Startup Founders, Investors & Talent Mixer
gary_2026_07_22_startup_founders_investo.label: Startup / Business
gary_2026_07_22_startup_founders_investo.place: St Pat's Bar & Grill, 22 W 46th St
gary_2026_07_22_startup_founders_investo.summary: Gary's Guide: Join a curated startup networking event in New York bringing together founders, investors, operators, engineers, & startup professionals for an evening of meaningful conversations & valuable connections. Unlike traditional networking events, the focus is on real discussions, practical insights, & opportunities that extend beyond the event itself. The evening includes: Structured networking sessions covering fundraising, product development, hiring, go-to-market strategy, & startup growth. Startup pitches featuring selected founders presenting their companies to investors, operators, & experienced entrepreneurs. Open networking sessions designed to help attendees build relationships & continue conversations. Attendees include: Startup founders from pre-seed to Series A Angel investors & venture capital professionals Product managers, engineers, & startup operators Recruiters & hiring leaders Sales & business development professionals Entrepreneurs building in AI, SaaS, FinTech, & emerging technologies Selected startups will have the opportunity to pitch their companies & receive feedback from investors & experienced founders. Investor participation is complimentary upon approval. Hosted by Ascent Valley, a global community connecting founders, investors, & operators through events, networking, & startup initiatives. Whether you are building a company, seeking investment opportunities, hiring talent, or expanding your network, this event offers an opportunity to connect with New York's startup ecosystem.

gary_2026_07_24_founder_strength_club.title: Founder Strength Club
gary_2026_07_24_founder_strength_club.label: Startup / Business
gary_2026_07_24_founder_strength_club.place: Premier Gym in New York, To Be Announced
gary_2026_07_24_founder_strength_club.summary: Gary's Guide: Hi, Andrew Yeung here. We started the Junto Founder Dinner series two years ago to bring together the top founders + builders. This time, we're doing something a little different. Instead of a seated breakfast, we're bringing together 24 vetted early-stage founders & CEOs for a private strength-based networking experience at a premier gym in New York. The session will be a 60-minute group workout class designed specifically to help ambitious founders connect in a more active, energizing environment. Expect a moderate-intensity strength class that is approachable for different fitness levels, but still requires the ability to participate in a full physical training session. After class, we'll have time to cool down, connect, & continue conversations with fellow high-performing startup leaders. What to expect: A private group strength class at a premier gym in New York Conversations with fellow ambitious founders, CEOs, & builders A post-class networking moment to meet peers solving similar problems Our only intent is to bring good, smart humans together - this time, with a little sweat involved. Details: Date: July 24, 2026 Time: 9:00am - 11:00am Venue: Premier Gym in New York Please note: This experience includes a physical group training class. You should be comfortable participating in approximately 60 minutes of moderate-intensity exercise. Apply to join by filling out the RSVP form. About our hosts & sponsors: Andrew Yeung is the Founder, CEO of fibe - a portfolio of events companies including andrew's mixers, The Junto Series & Lumos House. & the OOO Summit. He is also a Partner at Next Wave NYC, a pre-seed/seed found backed by Flybridge Capital. Andrew's hosted 100+ events for 50k+ tech founders & professionals in 8 cities that were featured in Bloomberg, Business Insider, Fast Company, & Fortune Magazine. Business Insider dubbed him the "Gatsby of Silicon Alley." Rho is the all-in-one banking platform for startups. With banking set up in minutes, 2% cashback cards, & powerful tools for managing spend, paying bills, & closing the books, Rho helps high-growth startups move fast & stay focused-with support that goes to the ends of the earth to help you win. Lowenstein Sandler's ECVC group delivers tailored legal strategies for launching, scaling, & financing companies in life sciences & healthcare. They close thousands of deals each year & advise founders on financings, licensing, & IP.

gary_2026_07_25_nj_code_coffee.title: NJ Code & Coffee
gary_2026_07_25_nj_code_coffee.label: Tech / AI
gary_2026_07_25_nj_code_coffee.summary: Gary's Guide: Calling all New Jersey techies to the monthly NJ Code & Coffee tech community meetup at the EqualSpace ES550 Tech & Innovation campus! Code & Coffee is an inclusive, informal networking/co-working session for those in tech (and the tech-curious). That includes operators, founders, & investors. Developers, data engineers, UX/UI designers, data scientists, product managers, software engineers, solution architects... all are welcome! People of all skill & experience levels can attend, we love it that way. Many people (optionally) bring projects to work on, & many other people (optionally) socialize the entire time. It's entirely up to you! Come grab a cup of coffee & meet new people, share stories, find collaborators, talk about everything tech, talk about everything NOT tech, take a break from job applications, get away from the computer screen, make connections, make conversation, make friends! Agenda: 2pm: Doors open, networking starts 2:30pm: Intro circle 3pm: networking continues 5pm: event ends The Intro Circle Near the beginning of the event (about 2:30 pm), we will do a standup in a circle: We first talk about organizer announcements, updates, & logistics. Then we go around the circle where each person says: *your name & job title/ role in tech/ tech stack, What you can help others with, *What you would like help with, Job opportunities you're hiring for OR announce that you are looking for one. If none, that's cool. After the introduction circle, everything is self-organized. Community Discord - come hang out before & after!: www.codeandcoffee.chat The Venue Equal Space is a premium share-space created with multicultural business owners in mind, =SPACE equips founders with resources, programming & a powerful network. Headquartered in the City of Newark, their share-space provides resources for startups, coaching for tech companies, & a wealth of intellectuals to collaborate & build with. The next wave in enterprises is being born within their walls. Become a part of the story: [EqualSpace.co/](https://equalspace.co/)

gary_2026_07_27_b2b_ai_founders_investor.title: B2B - AI Founders & Investors Meetup
gary_2026_07_27_b2b_ai_founders_investor.label: Tech / AI
gary_2026_07_27_b2b_ai_founders_investor.summary: Gary's Guide: NYC B2B is the premier community for B2B Founders, Operators, & Investors in NYC. NYC B2B often hosts happy hour events for founders, builders, & investors based in NYC. This is an exclusive event for B2B AI founders & investors. Want to sponsor this event? Email: newyorkcityventures@gmail.com This meetup is hosted by NYC B2B. It's a great way to meet other founders, builders, & investors. Whether you're building a company, exploring a side project, or considering a new idea, we would love to have you here. NYC B2B has previously hosted events for thousands of B2B startup founders + operators in NYC across Vertical SaaS, AI, FinTech, Healthcare, DevTools, Infrastructure, & more. By signing up, you are confirming your interest in hearing about more events from NYC B2B in the future via email! NYC B2B also helps connect those who sign up with awesome partners. Note: This is a 21+ event. Please let our team know in advance if you'd like to bring a guest, as unregistered +1s will not be admitted. Attendees who disregard this policy may not be invited to future NYC B2B events. - Hiring or looking for jobs? startupjobs.nyc

gary_2026_07_28_junto_founder_dinner.title: Junto Founder Dinner
gary_2026_07_28_junto_founder_dinner.label: Startup / Business
gary_2026_07_28_junto_founder_dinner.summary: Gary's Guide: Hi, Andrew Yeung here. We started the Junto Founder Dinner series two years ago to bring together the top founders + builders. Each month, we invite 24 vetted early-stage founders & CEOs for a 3-hour, multiple-course dinner experience. What to expect: A 3-course meal, courtesy of our partners Conversations with fellow high-performing startup leaders A dinner experience designed to facilitate new connections & conversations, with rotating 6-person table formats Meaningful connections with ambitious peers solving similar problems If you're wondering how our dinners usually go... read this Our only intent is to bring good, smart humans together. Details: Date: July 28, 2026 Time: 6:00pm - 8:30pm Venue: Private Dinner Club in NYC Past attendees of my events include the founders/C-suite of Venmo, Duolingo, Foursquare, Lyft, Goldman Sachs, Compass, Superhuman, Yext, OpenDoor, Chief, LearnVest, DocSend, Vercel, Loom, Morning Brew, The Hustle, Gas, Teachable, Replit, Twitter, Slack, Pinterest, Yahoo, MongoDB, Business Insider, Wonder, Hinge. Apply to join by filling out the RSVP form.

gary_2026_07_28_jfe_startup_tech_rooftop.title: JFE Startup & Tech Rooftop Mixer
gary_2026_07_28_jfe_startup_tech_rooftop.label: Startup / Business
gary_2026_07_28_jfe_startup_tech_rooftop.summary: Gary's Guide: JFE Network is excited to host its first Startup & Tech Rooftop Mixer in Hudson Yards, NY, with views overlooking the city! Join NY's premier startup & tech community for a fun summer gathering for networking & a great time connecting with our startup & tech network. JFE Networking mixers bring together NY's top startup founders, technologists, & business professionals in the Jewish community. If you're looking for co-founders to launch a startup or new career opportunities in tech, then you should join us! Many of our attendees formed deep relationships, hired each other, or started companies together. JFE (Jews For Entrepreneurship) Network For those who don't know about us, JFE (Jews For Entrepreneurship organization) is the leading & only organization that supports Jewish innovation & entrepreneurship worldwide. Since our launch in 2009, we have hosted over 120 events, including pitch events, seminars, speaker panels, startup accelerators, pitches for series A companies, career fairs, & networking mixers. We are now actively hosting events in SF, LA, Miami, NY, London, & New Mexico Read more about us here: www.jfenetwork.com

jc_culture_41819_2026_07_18_liberty_scie.title: LIBERTY SCIENCE CENTER ‘SLYMEZ’ GUESTS WITH HELP FROM GOGO SQUEEZ®
jc_culture_41819_2026_07_18_liberty_scie.label: Art / Culture
jc_culture_41819_2026_07_18_liberty_scie.place: LIBERTY SCIENCE CENTER, 222 JERSEY CIYT BOULEVARD, JERSEY CITY
jc_culture_41819_2026_07_18_liberty_scie.summary: Liberty Science Center is wrapping up its Summer of Soccer and Science celebration and inviting families to take part in a weekend of epic, action-packed activities. Get ready to dive in to adventures like Drone Soccer, Rat-thlete Matches, and the final ‘Pup Cup’ featuring our canine friends from the Seeing Eye. Plus attendees will have the opportunity to enjoy complimentary samples of GoGo squeeZ® SlymeZ, available while supplies last. This better-for-you snack comes in bold, sweet n’ sour flavors including Blue Raspberry, Strawberry Lemonade, Cherry and Green Apple, and is made with 100% real fruit, no added sugar, and comes in a smooth texture kids will love!

jc_culture_39860_2026_07_18_carrington_v.label: Festival / Market

jc_culture_39860_2026_07_18_carrington_v.summary: The Carrington Village Caribbean Festival returns on July 18, 2026. 5 years of culture, and VIBES!!! ​During this event we will enchant Jersey City with Caribbean flavors, highlighting West Indian culture, food, artists, and entertainment with various activities for the entire family. The event is FREE for all. Kids Zone, Music, Food, and Culture Performaces by: Boom Boom Room Rhythm Section Ekkquinox Steel Band CarNYval Dancer Mas by Urban Dance and Sugar Candy Mas Special Traditional performance by Le Troupe Zetwal (Haiti) Musical Performances by: Mesha Steele (from Jamaica), Fiyah B (from Barbados) and Erphaan Alves (From Trinidad and Tobago)

jc_culture_39108_2026_07_19_around_the_w.title: Around the World Watch Party 2026
jc_culture_39108_2026_07_19_around_the_w.label: Parks / Outdoor
jc_culture_39108_2026_07_19_around_the_w.summary: The “Around the World Watch Party” is a festival centered on a live broadcast of the World Cup Final. The event will transform Claremont Avenue (between West Side Avenue and Mallory Avenue) into an immersive “world village,” featuring curated cultural zones representing different regions. This program is designed to bring together residents, local businesses, and cultural organizations in a free and accessible public space that promotes community engagement and cultural exchange. Around the World Watch Party Finals Sunday, July 19th, 12-6 PMClaremont Ave, Between Mallory and West Side Argentina VS Spain Join us for an outdoor game viewing and multicultural festival, featuring live DJs, performances, and an immersive world village! One Match. One World. Sunday, July 19th, 12-6 PMClaremont Ave, Between Mallory and West Side 2 big screens streaming the world cup final Soccer & Culture • Food • Beer Garden DJ + Live Performances Local Vendors Photobooth Free Parking in NJ Transit Lot (DAILY)Located Right Off the West Side Light Rail Event Policies No re-entry prohibited. Supervision required for children under 12. Event may be photographed or recorded. Allowed/Prohibited items for Event Prohibited Items Outside Food or Beverages Weapons/No CCPS Illegal Substances Drones Fireworks or Explosives Pets (except service animals) Lawn Chairs SECURITY SCREENING REQUIRED All guests are subject to magnetometer screening and bag inspection. Note that any items you bring to the Around the World Watch Party could be subject to search. Please remember to keep bags, packages, strollers, etc. in sight. Do not leave any belongings unattended at any time.

jc_culture_10003560_2026_07_22_hamilton_.title: Hamilton Park Farmers Market 2026
jc_culture_10003560_2026_07_22_hamilton_.label: Festival / Market
jc_culture_10003560_2026_07_22_hamilton_.place: Hamilton Park, 9 McWilliams Pl., Jersey City, NJ
jc_culture_10003560_2026_07_22_hamilton_.summary: Join us at the Hamilton Park Farmers Market, your midweek destination for fresh, local, and thoughtfully crafted food and goods. Each week, we’re proud to feature farm-fresh produce from Stony Hill Farm alongside a curated selection of specialty vendors. Browse a variety of offerings including our long time vendor Pickles and Olives, fresh seafood from Scale Fish Market, and prepared foods perfect for dinner. You can also find baked goods, candles, personal care products, and more. You can even take advantage of convenient services like on-site knife sharpening while you shop. On the first and second Wednesdays of each month, enjoy live entertainment that adds to the vibrant, community atmosphere of the market. Whether you’re shopping for the week, grabbing a bite, or simply enjoying the park, the Hamilton Park Farmers Market is a welcoming space to connect with local vendors and neighbors.

jc_culture_40817_2026_07_25_club_1bd_jer.title: Club 1BD – Jersey City
jc_culture_40817_2026_07_25_club_1bd_jer.label: Art / Culture
jc_culture_40817_2026_07_25_club_1bd_jer.place: WHITE EAGLE HALL, 337 NEWARK AVE., JERSEY CITY
jc_culture_40817_2026_07_25_club_1bd_jer.summary: Get ready to immerse yourself in an electrifying night at **Club 1BD – Jersey City**! Join us at the iconic **White Eagle Hall**, where the vibrant atmosphere and stunning architecture create the perfect backdrop for an unforgettable concert experience. As the beats drop and the lights dance, CLUB 1BD will take you on a journey through the pulsating world of techno and electronic music, igniting your senses and keeping you on your feet all night long. Whether you’re a die-hard electronic music fan or just looking for a night of fun, this event promises to be a highlight of your calendar. So gather your friends and prepare for an evening filled with energy, excitement, and incredible sounds. Don’t miss out on this chance to be part of something special—secure your spot now and get ready to rave at **Club 1BD – Jersey City**!

jc_culture_10003563_2026_08_12_hamilton_.title: Hamilton Park Farmers Market 2026
jc_culture_10003563_2026_08_12_hamilton_.label: Festival / Market
jc_culture_10003563_2026_08_12_hamilton_.place: Hamilton Park, 9 McWilliams Pl., Jersey City, NJ
jc_culture_10003563_2026_08_12_hamilton_.summary: Join us at the Hamilton Park Farmers Market, your midweek destination for fresh, local, and thoughtfully crafted food and goods. Each week, we’re proud to feature farm-fresh produce from Stony Hill Farm alongside a curated selection of specialty vendors. Browse a variety of offerings including our long time vendor Pickles and Olives, fresh seafood from Scale Fish Market, and prepared foods perfect for dinner. You can also find baked goods, candles, personal care products, and more. You can even take advantage of convenient services like on-site knife sharpening while you shop. On the first and second Wednesdays of each month, enjoy live entertainment that adds to the vibrant, community atmosphere of the market. Whether you’re shopping for the week, grabbing a bite, or simply enjoying the park, the Hamilton Park Farmers Market is a welcoming space to connect with local vendors and neighbors.

jc_culture_39177_2026_08_15_west_indian_.title: West Indian Family Picnic 2026
jc_culture_39177_2026_08_15_west_indian_.label: Festival / Market
jc_culture_39177_2026_08_15_west_indian_.place: Lincoln Park, 1 County Rd 605, Jersey City, NJ
jc_culture_39177_2026_08_15_west_indian_.summary: County Commissioner Bill O’Dea and Chico Ramchal along side the West Indian American Committee will be holding a West Indian Family Fun Day at Lincoln Park, on August 15th, 2026 beginning at 11am and concluding at 8:00pm. This event is intended to provide a day and location where families of a West Indian background of Hudson County can congregate and celebrate their culture. It will also provide an insight to experience the West Indian culture if you are from any descent. Among culture sharing the committee will provide a host of community games for all age groups. Some of these activities include a tug-o-war, 100m race, sack race, etc. In conjunction with the activities, we will have a show mobile on location that will provide music and non-band performances, such as cultural dancing. The expected turnout is estimated at, with the committee providing over 50 volunteers to help support the event.
